personal.name: REZOUGUI Rayan Zin Eddine
personal.title: Full Stack Web Developer
personal.tagline: Building scalable web and mobile applications with modern technologies.
personal.bio: I'm a Full Stack Developer based in Algeria with a deep passion for building digital products that are fast, beautiful, and maintainable. I specialize in React ecosystems, Node.js back-ends, and mobile applications with React Native.
personal.bioLong:
I started coding at 17, driven by curiosity about how websites worked. Over the years I've grown from building simple HTML pages to architecting full-stack SaaS platforms with real-time features, complex data pipelines, and polished mobile apps.

I believe that great software is invisible — it gets out of the user's way and just works. I apply that principle to every project I take on, whether it's a fintech dashboard with thousands of daily users or a teaching curriculum designed to inspire the next generation of developers.

When I'm not coding, I'm writing about what I learn, mentoring students, or exploring new technologies that challenge my assumptions.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: End-to-end web applications built with Next.js, TypeScript, and modern tooling. From landing pages to complex SaaS platforms.

services.title: Mobile Apps
services.description: Cross-platform mobile applications with React Native. Native-feel UX with a single shared codebase for iOS and Android.

services.title: Backend & APIs
services.description: Scalable REST and GraphQL APIs built with NestJS and PostgreSQL. Clean architecture, authentication, and real-time capabilities.

services.title: Teaching & Mentoring
services.description: Structured web development courses for beginners. Hands-on, project-based curriculum that builds real-world confidence.

testimonials.name: Aymen Benali
testimonials.text: Rayan delivered our internal platform ahead of schedule with exceptional attention to detail. His ability to translate business requirements into clean technical solutions is remarkable.

testimonials.name: Sara Khelil
testimonials.text: Rayan's teaching style is clear, patient, and deeply practical. I went from zero to building my own portfolio website in just a few weeks.

testimonials.name: Karim Mansouri
testimonials.text: Working with Rayan on a joint client project was seamless. He's communicative, writes clean code, and always ships on time. Would collaborate again.

about.passion: I'm driven by the intersection of performance engineering and delightful user experience. Code should be elegant — readable by humans, not just machines.

projects.title: Fintech Dashboard
projects.description: A centralized platform for managing financial accounts and simplifying user-to-user payments. Features real-time transaction tracking and analytics.

projects.title: E-Learning Platform
projects.description: An educational SaaS application featuring VOD and live-streaming capabilities for students and teachers. Supports 100+ concurrent users.

projects.title: Real Estate Mobile App
projects.description: A property browsing and booking app for Aymen Promotion's clients. Built with React Native for iOS and Android.

projects.title: Dev Curriculum Builder
projects.description: An internal tool for creating and managing structured web development course syllabuses for the academy.

experience.description: Instructing beginner-level students in the fundamentals of web development, focusing on practical, hands-on projects.
Developing and maintaining internal software solutions and digital infrastructure for real estate development.
